set.body: Phase 5 fresh-eyes walkthrough: documented install.packages("amatrix", repos = c("https://bbuchsbaum.r-universe.dev", getOption("repos"))) failed literally in non-interactive R because getOption("repos") had no CRAN mirror. Even with explicit CRAN = https://cloud.r-project.org, available.packages did not list amatrix or backend packages amatrix.mlx, amatrix.opencl, amatrix.arrayfire, amatrix.metal. Fix docs to use an explicit CRAN fallback and verify R-universe registry/build availability from a fresh library before release.
set.title: Fix public R-universe install instructions and registry availability
